posts.author: TheGarfield (Matt Whitlock)
posts.cookedHtml:
Or make adding trials or services into a user request that admins have to approve.

Was advised to post in the feature request area. Original post and more about this here: Prevent users from initiating trials and new services on account

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @TheGarfield for the request!
